userMessage: Set CH1 scale to 200mV and offset to 0 using tm_devices

response.text:
I built a verified tm_devices flow to set CH1 scale to 200 mV and offset to 0.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Create a new tm_devices scope flow that sets CH1 scale to 0.2 V/div and CH1 offset to 0.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Set CH1 Scale and Offset","description":"Connect to the scope, set CH1 scale to 200 mV/div and offset to 0, then disconnect.","backend":"tm_devices","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set CH1 Scale","params":{"code":"scope.commands.ch[1].scale.write(\"0.2\")","model":"MSO56","description":"Set CH1 scale to 200 mV/div."},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set CH1 Offset","params":{"code":"scope.commands.ch[1].offset.write(\"0\")","model":"MSO56","description":"Set CH1 offset to 0 V."},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]},"id":"s1_4"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Create a new tm_devices scope flow that sets CH1 scale to 0.2 V/div and CH1 offset to 0.
suggestedFixes: Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: Set CH1 Scale and Offset
flow.description: Connect to the scope, set CH1 scale to 200 mV/div and offset to 0, then disconnect.
